chase-sapphire-reserve.earnings_summary: 4x Hotels & Airlines | 3x Dining World Wide | 1x Everywhere Else
chase-sapphire-reserve.highlighted_features: 8x Chase Travel | 4x Hotels & Airline booked direct | 3x Dining World Wide| $300 travel credit + $500 Edit Hotels Credit  | Priority Pass access with 2 guests
chase-sapphire-reserve.advait_quick_take: After its 2025 refresh, the Chase Sapphire Reserve now comes loaded with credits—and in the right hands, it can easily become a net profit.

hilton-aspire.card_name: Hilton Honors American Express Aspire Card
hilton-aspire.highlighted_features: Annual Free Night Award Starting Year 1 | Hilton Diamond Status | $400 Hilton Resort Credits | $200 Airline Incidental Credit
hilton-aspire.advait_quick_take: With the annual free night certificate and up to $400 in Hilton resort credits, this card can easily deliver more value than its annual fee. It also unlocks Hilton’s Diamond status—worth hundreds on its own through upgrades, free breakfast, and added perks.

venture-x.card_name: Capital One Venture X Rewards Credit Card
venture-x.highlighted_features: 2x Everywhere | $300 Annual Travel Credit | 10,000 Bonus Miles Each Year
venture-x.advait_quick_take: The premium card that actually makes sense for most people. The Capital One Venture X Credit Card $395 annual fee is easily offset with the $300 travel credit and 10K anniversary miles—no mental gymnastics or complicated spreadsheets required.

chase-sapphire-preferred.highlighted_features: Up To 5x On Travel | 3x On Dining & Online Groceries |3x On Gas & EV | 3x On Vacation Rentals | $100 Annual Hotel Credit | Complimentary DashPass
chase-sapphire-preferred.advait_quick_take: The best travel card for points and miles beginners. With access to Chase's full list of transfer partners including Hyatt, United, Air Canada and more.

venture.card_name: Capital One Venture Rewards Credit Card
venture.highlighted_features: Up To 5x On Travel | 2x Everywhere | 20+ Transfer Partners | TSA PreCheck Credit
venture.advait_quick_take: A simple, easy-to-use travel card that earns unlimited 2x miles on every purchase — no bonus categories to track. Perfect for beginners who want flexible miles they can redeem for travel or transfer to partners like Aeroplan, Qatar, Flying Blue, and more.

ciu.card_name: Chase Ink Business Unlimited® Credit Card
ciu.highlighted_features: 5% On Lyft Rides | 1.5% on All Other Purchases
ciu.advait_quick_take: The no-annual-fee business workhorse from Chase — simple flat-rate cash back on every purchase, but far more valuable when paired with a Sapphire or Ink Preferred to turn rewards into transferable travel points.

cfu.highlighted_features: 1.5% On All Spend | 3% On Dining & Drug Stores | No Annual Fee
cfu.advait_quick_take: The no-annual-fee everyday earner from Chase — simple cash back on its own, but much more powerful when paired with a Sapphire card to turn rewards into transferable travel points.

cic.card_name: Chase Ink Business Cash® Credit Card
cic.highlighted_features: 5% At Office Supply Stores | 5% On Internet, Cable & Phone | 2% On Gas & Dining
cic.advait_quick_take: The no-annual-fee business category powerhouse from Chase — high-value rewards on office supplies, phone, internet, gas, and dining, but far more valuable when paired with a Sapphire or Ink Preferred to turn rewards into transferable travel points.

csrb.card_name: The Sapphire Reserve for Business℠ Card
csrb.highlighted_features: 8x on Chase Travel | 4x On Flights & Hotels Booked Direct | 3x On Advertising
csrb.advait_quick_take: Unlock travel perks like airport lounge access, premium travel credits and Chase's entire list of transfer partners

cip.card_name:
Chase Ink Business Preferred®
Credit Card
cip.highlighted_features: 3x Shipping purchases & Online Advertising | 3x Internet, Cable & Phone | 3x Travel
cip.advait_quick_take: The best Chase Ink card for small businesses that want transferable points, strong bonus categories, and a simple way to turn business spend into travel.
